title: Surgeon Vacancy at Siemens Healthineers India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Siemens Healthineers India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India:
Siemens Healthineers India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India!
